meta.title: Tema Royals SC | Official Site
meta.description: Official website of Tema Royals SC football club.

footer.summary: {clubName} represents Tema with ambition, discipline, and community pride in Ghanaian football.

home.title: CHASING GLORY.
home.intro: Experience matchday in Tema. Stand with the Royals as the club pushes into another ambitious season.
home.lastMatchReport: Tema Royals secured a crucial 3-1 victory against Accra Lions B last Saturday. Captain Kofi Mensah opened the scoring in the 12th minute with a thunderous volley. Accra Lions B equalized just before halftime, but a double from striker Kwame Boateng in the 67th and 82nd minutes sealed the points for the Royals at Tema Sports Stadium. Team spirit was high as the defense held firm under late pressure.
home.upcomingInfo: Next Saturday at 18:00, Tema Royals face Ashaiman City at Ashaiman Community Park. This local test is expected to draw strong support from both sides. The Royals are coming off a win, while Ashaiman City have been difficult to break down in recent weeks. Tactical discipline will be key as Boateng looks to continue his scoring streak.
home.connectedCopy: Follow the Royals across all platforms.

players.title: THE FIRST TEAM
players.intro: Meet the players representing Tema Royals SC on the pitch. Discipline, skill, and pride in Tema.

staff.title: LEADERSHIP & STAFF
staff.intro: The minds and hands behind the Royals' progress. Meet our dedicated coaching and management team.

fixtures.title: FIXTURES & RESULTS
fixtures.intro: Track the Royals' upcoming tests and revisit the latest scorelines, venues, and key moments from recent matches.
fixtures.ticketsSoon: Tickets and travel details coming soon
fixtures.upcomingCopy: Every upcoming league date in one place, with clean venue and kick-off details.
fixtures.recentCopy: Completed matches with final scores and a quick breakdown of who struck when.

ticketsPage.title: MATCHDAY TICKETS
ticketsPage.intro: Witness the passion, the tempo, and the goals. Join the Royals faithful on matchday.
ticketsPage.parking: Parking available in lots A, B, and C.
ticketsPage.seasonCopy: Become part of the Royals family for the entire season. Season ticket holders get exclusive benefits including 15% off at the Royals Shop.

partnership.title: PARTNERSHIPS
partnership.intro: Partner with Tema Royals SC and connect your brand with our passionate community.
partnership.whyCopy: Tema Royals SC is more than just a football club. We are a Tema community platform with a loyal following across supporters, families, and young players. Our partnership programs are designed to deliver real business value while supporting the growth of the beautiful game.
partnership.brandCopy: Align with a legacy of excellence.
partnership.mediaKitCopy: Get detailed stats on our audience and partnership tiers.
partnership.readyCopy: We offer bespoke sponsorship packages tailored to your brand's specific goals. Let's discuss how we can grow together.

contactPage.title: CONTACT US
contactPage.intro: Have a question about tickets, merch, or trials? We're here to help the {clubName} family.
contactPage.name: Name
contactPage.subject: Subject
contactPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
contactPage.supportCopy: Our support team is available during standard business hours and 3 hours prior to any home match at the stadium office.
